block_00: Mindfulness: The Psychological Trick to Improve Your Trading
block_01: Traders constantly struggle against the influence of emotions and stress. Fortunately, there is a way to overcome these feelings of fear, panic, and doubt: developing the skill of mindful awareness.
block_02: Many agree that mindfulness can dramatically enhance trading performance. Traders who practice mindful awareness start to see the market better and improve their ability to stay focused, giving them a special trading edge.
block_04: The Power of Crossovers: EMA Trading Techniques
block_05: A moving average can be a powerful tool in the hands of a trader, especially when it comes to exponential moving averages. Together, these lines form an indicator beyond belief.
block_07: McGinley Dynamic Indicator — How Do You Trade It?
block_08: This little-known indicator is actually quite remarkable. Don’t let its appearance fool you. Though it looks like a moving average, it actually does so much more.
